data.description:

Token-Powered Gas Fees Ease Ethereum Transaction Hurdles
data.description:
Ethereum users have long struggled with failed transactions due to insufficient ETH for gas fees. On February 4, MetaMask introduced its new Gas Station feature to tackle this common issue. The update allows users to pay gas fees using select tokens rather than relying solely on ETH. This move comes as Ethereum faces increased network […]
The post Token-Powered Gas Fees Ease Ethereum...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/05/token-powered-gas-fees-ease-ethereum-transaction-hurdles/

data.title: How Trump's Trade War Is Affecting Bitcoin and Gold
data.description:
Gold and Bitcoin have previously moved together as "safe haven" assets. But that isn't the case with President Donald Trump back in action.
source: https://decrypt.co/304583/trump-trade-war-affecting-bitcoin-gold

data.title: XRP Price Enters Golden Pocket: Analyst Says It’s A Good Buy At These Levels
data.description:
The XRP price has entered a Golden Pocket—a key Fibonacci retracement level that often acts as strong support. According to a crypto analyst, this new development could present an attractive buying opportunity for investors, especially as the market consolidates. source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-enters-golden-pocket/
